targets.rawSql:
WITH last_per_employee AS (
  SELECT employee_name, MAX(work_date) AS last_date
  FROM work_logs
  WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
    AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
    AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
    AND employment_type IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
      OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
      OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
    )
  GROUP BY employee_name
),
last_row AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (w.employee_name) w.employee_name, w.work_date, w.employment_type
  FROM work_logs w
  JOIN last_per_employee l ON w.employee_name = l.employee_name AND w.work_date = l.last_date
  WHERE w.department IN (${service:sqlstring})
    AND w.activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
    AND (
      ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND w.employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
      OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND w.employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
      OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND w.employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
    )
  ORDER BY w.employee_name, w.work_date DESC
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract') THEN 'RW'
       WHEN employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor') THEN 'Sub'
       WHEN employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan') THEN 'Temp'
       ELSE COALESCE(employment_type, '') END AS "MA-Kat",
  employee_name AS "Employee",
  TO_CHAR(work_date, 'DD.MM.YYYY') AS "last transaction",
  (CURRENT_DATE - work_date::date)::integer AS "OffDays",
  ROUND(((CURRENT_DATE - work_date::date)::numeric / 30.0), 2) AS "OffMonth"
FROM last_row
ORDER BY "MA-Kat", "OffDays" DESC

list.label: Bereich
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_logs WHERE department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY department

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity_type FROM work_logs WHERE activity_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY activity_type

list.label: Employee

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT employee_name FROM work_logs WHERE employee_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employee_name
